raw_consumer_statement:
Company scammed customer. Bought tickets from a company and was allowed entry with 1 hour left because it was oversold. Stage was not built like the advertisement so it was false advertising. Because they failed inspection it was late too. Also because they denied entry people broke the barriers and ran through the barriers causing a safety hazard. 
These are everything XXXX had but still happened : XXXX XXXX had all the necessary equipment, materials, supplies, suppliers, vendors, labor and personnel to handle all the maintenance, construction, and build out for XXXX XXXX design and infrastructure like the stages, seating, bathrooms, and concessions, XXXX XXXX would pass all inspections and tests done by the City and other agencies or regulators ; XXXX XXXX would receive all the necessary permits and approvals by government agencies and other authorities to take place as scheduled ; XXXX XXXX would not be oversold or exceed capacity ; XXXX XXXX capacity and crown control would not violate, and comply at all times with, XXXX XXXX  XXXX fire codes and other capacity and safety rules and regulations applicable to XXXX XXXX concerts or festivals ; that everyone with a valid ticket would be able to attend and/or access XXXX XXXX XXXX and XXXX had oversold their shows. '' Also added a bunch of links to showcase what went wrong XXXX XXXX XXXX https : XXXX https : XXXXXXXX and https : XXXX https : XXXX https : XXXX
